mapper.select: SELECT qf.*, u.nickname AS user_name, wo.product_name AS work_order_product_name FROM quality_feedback qf LEFT JOIN user u ON qf.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON qf.work_order_id = wo.id WHERE qf.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quality_feedback (user_id, work_order_id, title, description, severity, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workOrderId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{severity}, 0)
